title: Brain Quest
description: Quick brain teasers and learning challenges. Learn while you play!

title: Word Scramble
description: Unscramble the letters before the timer runs out. Levels, lives and combos!

title: Math Blast
description: Solve quick math problems against the clock. Pick your difficulty and beat your best!

title: Spelling Bee
description: Listen to the word and type it correctly. Hear it again, use hints, beat the timer!

title: Maze Runner
description: Find your way through the maze to the flag. Arrow keys, buttons or swipe. Beat the clock!

title: Spirograph
description: Slide the gears and watch beautiful spiral patterns draw themselves. Save your art!

title: Doodle Pad
description: Draw, paint and stamp emojis to make your own picture, then save it!

title: Kaleidoscope Draw
description: Every line you draw is mirrored into a magical kaleidoscope pattern.

title: Animal Band
description: Tap the animals to make funny sounds, record a song and play it back!

title: Dress Up
description: Mix and match characters, hats and accessories to create your own friend. Save it!

title: Hanuman Run
description: An Indian-mythology endless runner — leap over rakshasas, duck under arrows, race to Lanka!

title: Krishna's Cows
description: Be Krishna the Gopala — play your flute and herd all the cows safely home before sunset!
